description_long: This is a rectangular picnic basket with a woven exterior featuring alternating bands of turquoise blue and white, creating a visually striking checkered pattern. The basket has two sturdy, folding handles made of the same woven material, attached at the top edges with visible metal fasteners. The interior is spacious and open, with the weave pattern continuing on the inside walls, and the rim is reinforced for added durability. The basket does not have a lid, leaving the contents easily accessible from above. The weave is tight and uniform, providing both strength and a decorative appearance. The overall design is practical for carrying food and items, while the color scheme adds a cheerful, summery touch suitable for outdoor urban settings like parks or gardens.
description: A rectangular, turquoise and white woven picnic basket with two folding handles and an open top. The tight, checkered weave and reinforced rim give it a sturdy, decorative look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both folding handles upright and the checkered turquoise and white weave pattern.
description_view_1: Side view with one handle upright, highlighting the basket's depth and the reinforced rim.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both handles visible and the same woven pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with one handle upright, emphasizing the basket's rectangular shape and open interior.
attribute_handle_type: Two folding, woven handles attached with metal fasteners; semi-rigid and arched.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with alternating turquoise and white bands in a checkered pattern.
